title: Ardisia dekinderi
taxonomy: Ardisia dekinderi is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It is a type of evergreen shrub native to Southeast Asia. intro: Ardisia dekinderi, also known as Dekinderia, is a plant species in the family Myrsinaceae, native to the tropical forests of Asia. The health benefits of Dekinderia include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
